title: Map the Web Release Manifest
description: Describes the per-release build metadata document (manifest.json) shipped alongside Map artifacts. See README.md for full documentation.

buildId.description: Identifier for the build that produced this manifest. Typically the release tag (e.g. 'v20260324.1') or a local-build placeholder (e.g. 'local-1234567890').

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this manifest was produced.

gitSha.description: Git commit SHA the build was produced from. May carry a '-dirty' suffix when the working tree had uncommitted changes at build time.

maps.description: Map name to per-major-version artifact entries.

mapVersionEntry.description: Descriptor for a single major-version artifact within a release.

filename.description: Name of the JSON data artifact for this major version (e.g. 'forms.v1.json').

cid.description: Content identifier for the data artifact. Currently 'sha256:<hex>'.

schema.description: Name of the JSON Schema file for this major version (e.g. 'forms.v1.schema.json').

deprecated.description: Optional. True when this major version has entered its end-of-life support window and consumers should expect it to be removed in a future release. Does not indicate when, nor imply a successor major necessarily exists.
